# ertodebana

> Technical writing on DevOps, platform engineering, AI, and cloud-native systems in Turkish and English.

## Primary

- [Turkish homepage](https://ertodebana.github.io/): Latest posts in the default language.
- [English homepage](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/): English version of the site.
- [About in Turkish](https://ertodebana.github.io/hakkinda/): Scope and focus of the blog.
- [About in English](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/about/): Scope and focus of the blog.

## Navigation

- [Turkish archive](https://ertodebana.github.io/arsiv/)
- [English archive](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/archive/)
- [Turkish categories](https://ertodebana.github.io/kategoriler/)
- [English categories](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/categories/)
- [Turkish tags](https://ertodebana.github.io/etiketler/)
- [English tags](https://ertodebana.github.io/en/tags/)

## Full Index

- [LLMs full index](https://ertodebana.github.io/llms-full.txt): Complete article list in both languages.
